title: Iran reportedly closes Strait of Hormuz again, casting shadow over nuclear talks
title_zh: 据报道伊朗再次关闭霍尔木兹海峡，为核谈判蒙上阴影
text: Iran's joint military command said the closure was in response to continued Israeli military operations in Lebanon.
zh: 伊朗联合军事指挥部表示，封锁是为了回应以色列在黎巴嫩持续的军事行动。

title: 'Fun dads' get 5 things right about parenting that many people forget—'they're worth borrowing' this Father's Day, says expert
title_zh: 专家表示，“有趣的爸爸”在育儿方面做了五件事，但很多人都忘记了——今年父亲节“值得借用”
text: Many parents spend their days managing schedules, chores and responsibilities. This Father's Day, a parenting expert shares five "fun dad" habits that can increase joy and strengthen parent-child relationships.
zh: 许多父母每天都在管理日程、家务和责任。今年父亲节，育儿专家分享了五个“有趣的爸爸”习惯，可以增加快乐并加强亲子关系。

title: Scared to spend your retirement money? Here’s one way to get over the fear of running out.
title_zh: 害怕花掉你的退休金吗？这是克服耗尽恐惧的一种方法。
text: This fear is probably going to cause you some regrets.
zh: 这种恐惧可能会让你后悔。

title: You’re going to pay tax on RMDs — there’s no way around it. Or is there?
title_zh: 你需要为 RMD 缴税——这是没有办法避免的。或者有吗？
text: Here’s your new playbook to protect your retirement cash.
zh: 这是保护您退休现金的新策略。

title: Social Security is looking at a $500-a-month cut. Could a new bipartisan commission make a difference?
title_zh: 社会保障计划每月削减 500 美元。新的两党委员会能带来改变吗？
text: A new legislative proposal would create a bipartisan commission to strengthen the finances of Social Security and Medicare at a time when the programs are under pressure.
zh: 一项新的立法提案将成立一个两党委员会，以在社会保障和医疗保险项目面临压力之际加强其财政。

title: Inside the push to weaken Washington’s toughest financial watchdog
title_zh: 削弱华盛顿最严厉金融监管机构的努力
text: The SEC used to intimidate corporate wrongdoers. Now its own commissioners are gutting its leverage.
zh: 美国证券交易委员会过去常常恐吓企业违法者。现在它自己的委员们正在削弱它的影响力。

title: We read the Social Security and Medicare trustees reports. If you’re not worried, you should be.
title_zh: 我们阅读了社会保障和医疗保险受托人报告。如果你不担心，你应该担心。
text: The truth about “DOGE” savings, no tax on Social Security, immigration — and more.
zh: 关于“DOGE”储蓄、社会保障免税、移民等等的真相。

title: Want to splurge on travel in retirement? Here’s how to plan for it.
title_zh: 想在退休后挥霍旅行吗？以下是如何制定计划。
text: A lot of people wait until retirement to take big trips. Plan ahead, and don’t wait too long.
zh: 许多人等到退休后才进行长途旅行。提前计划，不要等待太久。

title: I’m 73 and living 100% off dividends from my stocks. How can I create even more income?
title_zh: 我今年 73 岁，靠股票股息 100% 过活。我怎样才能创造更多的收入？
text: A “bulletproof” portfolio may be impossible, but you can try to get close if you have enough money invested
zh: “防弹”投资组合可能是不可能的，但如果您投资了足够的资金，您可以尝试接近这一目标

title: The one-page pledge that forces your financial adviser to put you first
title_zh: 一页纸的承诺迫使您的财务顾问将您放在第一位
text: Most investors ignore this abstract legal rule — and it’s fueling a massive wave of fraud.
zh: 大多数投资者忽视了这一抽象的法律规则——这助长了大规模的欺诈浪潮。

title: Opinion | China erects a new Great Wall - The Washington Post
title_zh: 意见 |中国修筑新长城 - 《华盛顿邮报》
text: Opinion | China erects a new Great Wall The Washington Post
zh: 意见 | 《华盛顿邮报》：中国修建了新的长城

title: China’s ‘Companion Economy’ Is Here. Watch These Stocks. - Barron's
title_zh: 中国的“伴侣经济”已经到来。关注这些股票。 - 巴伦周刊
text: China’s ‘Companion Economy’ Is Here. Watch These Stocks. Barron's
zh: 中国的“伴侣经济”已经到来。关注这些股票。巴伦周刊

title: MSCI China Stock Gauge Heads for Bear Market as Tech Weakness Extends - Bloomberg.com
title_zh: 随着技术疲软的延续，摩根士丹利资本国际 (MSCI) 中国股指走向熊市 - Bloomberg.com
text: MSCI China Stock Gauge Heads for Bear Market as Tech Weakness Extends Bloomberg.com
zh: 随着技术疲软的延续，摩根士丹利资本国际 (MSCI) 中国股指走向熊市 Bloomberg.com

title: China's economy struggles to regain domestic momentum despite export boom: Report - The Times of India
title_zh: 尽管出口繁荣，中国经济仍难以恢复国内动力：报告 - 印度时报
text: China's economy struggles to regain domestic momentum despite export boom: Report The Times of India
zh: 印度时报报道，尽管出口繁荣，中国经济仍难以恢复国内动力

title: Commentary: Beijing cracks down on cross-border investment but it is up to something grander - CNA
title_zh: 评论：北京打击跨境投资，但它有更大的目的-CNA
text: Commentary: Beijing cracks down on cross-border investment but it is up to something grander CNA
zh: 评论：北京打击跨境投资，但有更大的目的 CNA

title: AI buildout gives tech investors new reasons to watch bond market
title_zh: 人工智能的发展为科技投资者提供了关注债券市场的新理由
text: Tech giants are depleting cash reserves and raising debt in their ambitious data center buildouts, a dynamic that's forcing investors to watch interest rates.
zh: 科技巨头正在耗尽现金储备，并在其雄心勃勃的数据中心建设中举债，这种动态迫使投资者关注利率。

title: The budget airline model in the U.S. is running out of runway
title_zh: 美国的廉价航空公司模式即将耗尽跑道
text: Spirit's bankruptcy as United and Delta fly high suggests there's more to success in airline industry than low fares, and failure isn't about jet fuel spikes.
zh: 随着联合航空和达美航空的飞速发展，精神航空破产，这表明航空业的成功不仅仅在于低票价，而失败与航空燃油飙升无关。

title: Bitcoin's future as revolutionary as the smartphone, according to CoinDesk
title_zh: CoinDesk 表示，比特币的未来将像智能手机一样具有革命性
text: CoinDesk’s president of indices and data has a message for investors: Don’t count out bitcoin.
zh: CoinDesk 的指数和数据总裁向投资者传达了一条信息：不要指望比特币。

title: SNAP restrictions could change what shoppers buy — and food giants are watching
title_zh: SNAP 限制可能会改变购物者的购买方式——食品巨头正在关注
text: SNAP food restrictions are spreading to more states, pressuring major food and beverage as consumers shift spending away from soda, candy and processed foods.
zh: SNAP 食品限制正在蔓延到更多州，随着消费者将支出从苏打水、糖果和加工食品上转移，主要食品和饮料面临压力。

title: I’m 55 and retiring in 6 years. Should I be switching to Roth 401(k) contributions now?
title_zh: 我今年 55 岁，6 年后退休。我现在应该转向 Roth 401(k) 捐款吗？
text: People are still holding back on participating in Roth plans at work, Vanguard says.
zh: 先锋集团表示，人们仍然不愿在工作中参与罗斯计划。

title: SpaceX’s massive valuation may soon become its own worst enemy
title_zh: SpaceX 的巨额估值可能很快就会成为其最大的敌人
text: The biggest companies struggle to keep up with the stock market due to size alone.
zh: 仅凭规模，最大的公司就难以跟上股市的步伐。

title: ‘Money can make you happy’: My wife and I have no heirs, but we’re making the world a better place by giving it away
title_zh: “金钱可以让你快乐”：我和妻子没有继承人，但我们通过捐赠金钱让世界变得更美好
text: “If you find a need in your community, there’s likely an organization that will help you get involved.”
zh: “如果您发现社区有需求，很可能会有一个组织帮助您参与其中。”

title: Americans’ 401(k) balances hit record levels last year. See how you compare.
title_zh: 去年美国人的 401(k) 余额创下历史新高。看你比较如何。
text: It was a very good year for most workplace retirement savers, according to Vanguard’s latest “How America Saves” report
zh: 根据先锋集团最新的“美国如何储蓄”报告，对于大多数工作场所退休储蓄者来说，这是非常好的一年

title: Tesla booted from the ‘Magnificent Seven’ by a top fund manager. Here is the tech giant he’s crowned.
title_zh: 特斯拉被一位顶级基金经理从“七巨头”中剔除。这是他加冕的科技巨头。
text: T. Rowe Price fund manager David Giroux says Big Tech isn’t in a bubble, but there’s value in healthcare and utilities.
zh: T. Rowe Price 基金经理 David Giroux 表示，大型科技公司并未陷入泡沫，但医疗保健和公用事业领域具有价值。

title: Three powerful forces are draining family wealth — and your estate plan is completely unprepared
title_zh: 三大强大力量正在耗尽家族财富——而您的遗产计划却完全措手不及
text: From Medicaid cuts to an IRA tax trap, here are the real threats to your family’s inheritance and what to do about them.
zh: 从医疗补助削减到爱尔兰共和军税收陷阱，以下是对您家庭遗产的真正威胁以及应对措施。

title: The loneliness crisis has gotten so bad that lawmakers are ready to spend millions of dollars to fight it
title_zh: 孤独危机已经变得如此严重，以至于立法者准备花费数百万美元来应对它
text: The health damage of loneliness is similar to heavy smoking and obesity
zh: 孤独对健康的损害类似于大量吸烟和肥胖

title: ‘Tell the story well’: China pushes brokerages to shape stock market narrative - South China Morning Post
title_zh: “讲好故事”：中国推动券商塑造股市叙事 - 南华早报
text: ‘Tell the story well’: China pushes brokerages to shape stock market narrative South China Morning Post
zh: “讲好故事”：中国推动券商塑造股市叙事 南华早报

title: 7 Best-Performing China Stocks for June 2026 - NerdWallet
title_zh: 2026 年 6 月 7 只表现最佳的中国股票 - NerdWallet
text: 7 Best-Performing China Stocks for June 2026 NerdWallet
zh: 2026 年 6 月 7 只表现最佳的中国股票 NerdWallet

title: Commentary: What China’s underperforming tech stocks say about its real economy - CNA
title_zh: 评论：中国表现不佳的科技股对其实体经济有何影响 - CNA
text: Commentary: What China’s underperforming tech stocks say about its real economy CNA
zh: 评论：中国表现不佳的科技股对其实体经济有何影响 CNA

title: China in the Year of the Horse: A stable trot or a brisk gallop? - J.P. Morgan Private Bank
title_zh: 马年的中国：稳健的小跑还是轻快的驰骋？ - 摩根大通私人银行
text: China in the Year of the Horse: A stable trot or a brisk gallop? J.P. Morgan Private Bank
zh: 马年的中国：稳健的小跑还是轻快的驰骋？摩根大通私人银行

title: Massive bonuses for South Korea's chip workers puts central bank on inflation alert
title_zh: 韩国芯片工人的巨额奖金使央行陷入通胀警报
text: Workers from tech industries receive bonus worth millions of won, prompting the Bank of Korea to warn of the upward pressure to inflation.
zh: 科技行业的工人获得了价值数百万韩元的奖金，促使韩国央行对通胀上行压力发出警告。

title: My mother was co-owner of my late grandmother’s bank account. Should she share the money with her siblings?
title_zh: 我的母亲是我已故祖母银行账户的共同所有者。她应该和她的兄弟姐妹分享这些钱吗？
text: “The will stated that the estate was to be divided equally among her children.”
zh: “遗嘱规定，遗产将平均分配给她的孩子们。”

title: DOJ rebuffs judge's request to put in writing it won't move forward with 'anti-weaponization' fund
title_zh: 司法部拒绝法官以书面形式提出不会推进“反武器化”基金的请求
text: The DOJ in May announced it was creating the fund as part of a settlement of President Donald Trump's $10 billion lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service.
zh: 美国司法部 5 月宣布设立该基金，作为唐纳德·特朗普总统针对国税局 100 亿美元诉讼的和解协议的一部分。

title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入修正区间的美国基准指数
text: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

title: Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices
title_zh: 尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次
text: The central bank's so-called dot plot showed a median estimate of 3.4% for the federal funds rate, the same as at the end of last year.
zh: 央行所谓的点阵图显示，联邦基金利率的中值为3.4%，与去年年底相同。

title: The momentum trades of 2026 are breaking with gold, silver and South Korea down big
title_zh: 2026年的势头交易正在被打破，黄金、白银和韩国大幅下跌
text: Each of these assets caught a bid this year as investors nervous about their exposure to U.S. large cap tech sought out different asset classes.
zh: 由于投资者对美国大型科技公司的风险敞口感到紧张，因此这些资产今年都受到了竞购，纷纷寻求不同的资产类别。

title: My two sons will inherit a $30,000 annuity from their grandmother. What should I do with the money?
title_zh: 我的两个儿子将从他们的祖母那里继承 30,000 美元的年金。我应该用这笔钱做什么？
text: “My understanding is that they have five years to withdraw the money.”
zh: “我的理解是，他们有五年的时间来提取这笔钱。”

title: Employers to college students: Never mind that 4.0 GPA. Go out and get a summer job.
title_zh: 用人单位对大学生：GPA 4.0 别介意。出去找一份暑期工作。
text: College students with any sort of work experience on their résumés are twice as likely to be employed shortly after graduating.
zh: 简历上有任何工作经验的大学生在毕业后不久找到工作的可能性是其他人的两倍。

title: ‘We are habitually frugal’: My wife and I have money. How do we help our children without ruining their independence?
title_zh: “我们习惯节俭”：我和妻子有钱。我们如何帮助我们的孩子而不破坏他们的独立性？
text: “Partly due to some mental-health issues, they may continue to go through life living paycheck to paycheck, or worse.”
zh: “部分由于一些心理健康问题，他们可能会继续靠工资过活，甚至更糟。”

title: ‘I’ll probably be working until I die’: I’m 60, work as a waiter and have $2,000 in a Roth IRA. What will happen to me?
title_zh: “我可能会工作到死”：我今年 60 岁，是一名服务员，Roth IRA 里有 2,000 美元。我会发生什么事？
text: “I’m afraid I’m in a bad place.”
zh: “恐怕我的处境很糟糕。”

title: Warsh’s new task forces give the Fed wiggle room to put off changing rates until December
title_zh: 沃什的新工作组为美联储提供了将利率调整推迟到12月的回旋余地
text: During his first press conference as Fed chair Wednesday, Kevin Warsh repeated one refrain in his answers to many reporters’ questions: A task force is looking into it.
zh: 在周三担任美联储主席的首次新闻发布会上，凯文·沃什在回答许多记者的问题时重复了一句话：一个工作组正在调查此事。

title: Trump picked Kevin Warsh to cut rates. The new Fed chief just told us he has other plans.
title_zh: 特朗普选择凯文·沃什来降息。新任美联储主席刚刚告诉我们他还有其他计划。
text: Here’s what the central bank’s hawkish agenda means for your money.
zh: 以下是央行的鹰派议程对您的资金意味着什么。

title: Fed watching is looking very different now. Two charts can help you in the Warsh era.
title_zh: 美联储的观察现在看起来非常不同。两张图表可以帮助你了解沃什时代。
text: Kevin Warsh is forcing Wall Street to do the heavy lifting. Use these benchmarks to find your footing.
zh: 凯文·沃什正在迫使华尔街承担重任。使用这些基准来找到你的立足点。

title: Is the stock market closed today for Juneteenth? Will the post office deliver mail?
title_zh: 今天是六月节股市休市吗？邮局会送邮件吗？
text: The June 19 federal holiday falls on a Friday this year. Here’s how trading hours and other services are affected.
zh: 6 月 19 日联邦假日今年恰逢周五。以下是交易时间和其他服务受到的影响。

title: Oil prices face fresh wave of volatility amid conflicting reports about Strait of Hormuz reopening and ongoing regional strife
title_zh: 由于有关霍尔木兹海峡重新开放和持续的地区冲突的相互矛盾的报道，油价面临新一波波动
text: A flurry of headlines on Friday point to an increasingly fragile deal between the U.S. and Iran.
zh: 周五的一系列头条新闻都表明美国和伊朗之间的协议日益脆弱。

title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?
title_zh: “我们完全拥有自己的房子”：我今年 67 岁，收入 10 万美元。我现在领取每年 30,000 美元的社会保障还是等待？
text: “We have combined savings of $950,000 in retirement plans, Roth IRAs and Treasuries.”
zh: “我们在退休计划、Roth IRA 和国债中总共节省了 950,000 美元。”

title: The Dow Jones of Old China: State-Owned Giants Still Dominating the World’s Second-Largest Economy - Disruption Banking
title_zh: 旧中国的道琼斯指数：国有巨头仍然主导着世界第二大经济体 - 颠覆性银行业
text: The Dow Jones of Old China: State-Owned Giants Still Dominating the World’s Second-Largest Economy Disruption Banking
zh: 旧中国的道琼斯指数：国有巨头仍主导世界第二大经济颠覆银行业

title: Oil tanker traffic in Strait of Hormuz jumps after U.S. and Iran implement deal to open sea lane
title_zh: 美国和伊朗实施开放海上航线协议后，霍尔木兹海峡的油轮运输量激增
text: The U.S.-Iran deal has raised questions about how the Strait of Hormuz will be governed after the toll-free period ends.
zh: 美国与伊朗的协议引发了有关免费期结束后将如何管理霍尔木兹海峡的疑问。

title: The riskiest SpaceX stock trade of all had a big first week
title_zh: 风险最高的 SpaceX 股票交易首周表现强劲
text: SpaceX's IPO did not just mint the biggest debut in market history and a trillionaire, but it also triggered a historic land grab in risky leveraged ETFs.
zh: SpaceX 的 IPO 不仅创造了市场历史上最大的首次公开募股和万亿富翁，而且还引发了风险杠杆 ETF 的历史性抢滩。

title: NetJets' first fatal crash kills influential Texas VC founder
title_zh: NetJets 的第一次致命事故导致颇具影响力的德克萨斯州风险投资创始人丧生
text: NetJets is not speculating on what caused one of its planes to crash onto a highway in Laredo, Texas late Tuesday, killing a prominent tech entrepreneur.
zh: NetJets 并未推测其一架飞机周二晚间坠毁在德克萨斯州拉雷多的高速公路上，导致一名著名科技企业家丧生的原因。

title: Homeowners tapped $47 billion in equity in the first quarter. What to consider before you borrow
title_zh: 第一季度房主动用了 470 亿美元的股本。借钱之前要考虑什么
text: While high home values mean homeowners are sitting on an estimated $11 trillion in equity, it should not be viewed as free money, experts say.
zh: 专家表示，虽然高房价意味着房主坐拥约 11 万亿美元的股本，但不应将其视为免费资金。

title: Fedspeak vs. war deal: Here are the things that drove this week's stock market
title_zh: 美联储言论与战争协议：以下是推动本周股市走势的因素
text: The S&P 500 surged on Thursday, making up for losses seen after central bankers convened.
zh: 标准普尔 500 指数周四飙升，弥补了央行会议后的损失。

title: 29-year-old making $250k in tech went 'undercover' at a coffee chain before opening her own matcha cafe
title_zh: 29 岁的科技年收入 25 万美元，在开设自己的抹茶咖啡馆之前，曾在一家咖啡连锁店“卧底”
text: Michelle Yeung wasn't happy in tech, despite earning $250,000 a year. Before opening Matcha House, she spent months learning the business.
zh: 尽管年收入 25 万美元，米歇尔·杨 (Michelle Yeung) 对科技行业并不满意。在开办抹茶屋之前，她花了几个月的时间学习业务。

title: U.S.-Iran deal in photos: ships in the Strait of Hormuz, daily life in Tehran
title_zh: 照片中的美伊协议：霍尔木兹海峡的船只、德黑兰的日常生活
text: The first signs of a post-war recovery are emerging across the Middle East after the United States and Iran signed a memorandum aimed at ending the conflict.
zh: 在美国和伊朗签署旨在结束冲突的备忘录后，战后复苏的最初迹象正在整个中东地区出现。

title: Yen slides past 161 against the dollar, nearing 40-year low and reviving intervention bets
title_zh: 日元兑美元跌破161，接近40年低点，干预押注重燃
text: On Thursday the yen saw a sharp depreciation a high of 161.80, its weakest since July 2024.
zh: 周四日元大幅贬值至161.80高点，为2024年7月以来的最低水平。

title: Indian IT stocks slump up to 7% as Accenture cuts revenue outlook, fueling fresh concerns over sector growth
title_zh: 埃森哲下调收入预期，印度 IT 股暴跌 7%，引发对行业增长的新担忧
text: Shares of major Indian IT companies fall up to 7% after global sector leader Accenture cuts its revenue guidance.
zh: 全球行业领导者埃森哲下调收入预期后，印度主要 IT 公司股价下跌 7%。

title: MSCI isn't done with Indonesia yet: new report signals continued concerns over market transparency
title_zh: MSCI 与印度尼西亚的关系尚未结束：新报告表明对市场透明度的持续担忧
text: MSCI flagged growing concerns about transparency in Indonesia's stock market.
zh: 摩根士丹利资本国际 (MSCI) 指出，人们对印度尼西亚股市透明度的担忧日益加剧。

title: Japan core inflation holds steady in May, matching expectations despite energy price concerns
title_zh: 尽管能源价格担忧，但日本 5 月份核心通胀保持稳定，符合预期
text: Headline inflation edged up to 1.5% from 1.4%, while the so called "core-core" inflation rate, eased to 1.8% from 1.9%.
zh: 总体通胀率从 1.4% 微升至 1.5%，而所谓的“核心-核心”通胀率则从 1.9% 降至 1.8%。

title: Berkshire shares trade lower even after Abel scores good marks at meeting, earnings jump
title_zh: 即使阿贝尔在会议上取得好成绩、盈利大幅增长，伯克希尔股价仍走低
text: Many in the investment community were reassured by Abel's firm grasp over Berkshire's sprawling enterprise.
zh: 阿贝尔对伯克希尔庞大企业的坚定控制让投资界的许多人感到放心。

title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
text: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
title_zh: 财政部长贝森特支持降息，但表示他理解美联储是否愿意等待
text: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
text: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

title: Musk's SpaceX stake is worth over $1 trillion. Here are the other billionaire shareholders
title_zh: 马斯克持有的 SpaceX 股份价值超过 1 万亿美元。以下是其他亿万富翁股东
text: SpaceX shares were up 37% after its historic debut last week, which offered shares at a set price of $135.
zh: SpaceX 上周以 135 美元的定价发行股票，历史性地首次亮相，股价上涨 37%。

title: U.S.-Iran accord hits early snag after Swiss talks fail to proceed as planned
title_zh: 瑞士会谈未能按计划进行后，美国与伊朗的协议遭遇早期障碍
text: Analysts reckon a lasting resolution to the Middle East conflict will take some time to materialize.
zh: 分析人士认为，中东冲突的持久解决方案需要一段时间才能实现。

title: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe'
title_zh: 内存危机达到如此极端“连苹果也不能安全”
text: Apple appears poised to take the rare step of increasing prices to deal with what CEO Tim Cook called an "unsustainable" memory shortage.
zh: 苹果似乎准备采取罕见的涨价举措，以应对首席执行官蒂姆·库克所说的“不可持续”的内存短缺问题。

title: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says his power has 'no limits': Axios
title_zh: 特朗普声称伊朗协议是“无条件投降”，称他的权力“没有限制”：Axios
text: Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression.
zh: 特朗普周四晚上在美国接受 Axios 采访时表示，他谈判达成这项协议是为了防止冲突引发全球萧条。

title: Struggling to find a job? Try looking in Nevada
title_zh: 正在努力寻找工作吗？尝试在内华达州寻找
text: The sparsely populated state known for its world-class casinos and dry climate has been a hiring hot spot.
zh: 这个人口稀少的州以其世界一流的赌场和干燥的气候而闻名，一直是招聘热点。

title: Bob Iger reflects on 10 years of Shanghai Disneyland as it defies the Chinese pullback
title_zh: 鲍勃·艾格回顾上海迪士尼乐园十年来不顾中国撤资的消息
text: Shanghai Disneyland hit 100 million cumulative visitors in 2025, according to the company. It's a relatively new but important foothold in Disney's history.
zh: 据该公司称，到2025年，上海迪士尼乐园累计游客量将突破1亿人次。这是迪士尼历史上相对较新但重要的立足点。

title: Brent oil dips below $80 as postponed U.S.-Iran talks temper optimism over ceasefire progress
title_zh: 由于推迟的美伊谈判削弱了对停火进展的乐观情绪，布伦特原油跌破80美元
text: With immediate supply fears fading and tanker traffic returning to the Strait of Hormuz, traders are turning their attention back to oil demand and OPEC's outlook for the market.
zh: 随着当前供应担忧的消退以及油轮运输返回霍尔木兹海峡，交易商将注意力重新转向石油需求和欧佩克对市场的前景。

title: Russia threatens escalation after Ukraine hits Moscow with largest-ever drone attack
title_zh: 乌克兰对莫斯科发动有史以来最大规模的无人机袭击后，俄罗斯威胁升级
text: Russia has pledged to carry out frequent and "massive group strikes" against Ukraine shortly after Kyiv launched a barrage of drones on Moscow.
zh: 在基辅向莫斯科发射无人机后不久，俄罗斯承诺对乌克兰进行频繁的“大规模集体打击”。

title: Hormuz relief may not ease the economic toll that's already 'baked in,' analysts warn
title_zh: 分析人士警告称，霍尔木兹海峡救援可能无法减轻已经“根深蒂固”的经济损失
text: Early signs of reopening of the Strait of Hormuz have lifted the most acute threat to global energy supplies but economic damages from the war will take months to unwind.
zh: 霍尔木兹海峡重新开放的早期迹象已经消除了对全球能源供应的最严重威胁，但战争造成的经济损失需要几个月的时间才能消除。

title: India's largest telecom and digital service Jio Platforms files for IPO
title_zh: 印度最大的电信和数字服务 Jio Platforms 申请 IPO
text: India's largest wireless operator and digital service provider, Jio Platforms files for IPO
zh: 印度最大的无线运营商和数字服务提供商 Jio Platforms 申请 IPO

title: Jio Platforms eyes low-orbit satellite rollout as Starlink awaits India launch
title_zh: 星链等待印度发射，Jio Platforms 着眼于推出低轨道卫星
text: Jio Platforms, India's largest telecom operator and digital services company, wants to rollout statelite communication in the country where Starlink still awaits launch.
zh: 印度最大的电信运营商和数字服务公司 Jio Platforms 希望在 Starlink 仍在等待推出的国家推出国家通信服务。

title: Why Japan's $70 billion-plus intervention and a rate hike didn't prop up the yen more
title_zh: 为什么日本超过 700 亿美元的干预和加息没有进一步支撑日元
text: Japan was willing to step in to defend the yen around the 160 level before, and it's at that point again.
zh: 日本之前曾愿意出手捍卫日元160附近的水平，现在又是这个时候了。

title: U.S. opens tariff probe targeting Germany’s drug pricing policies
title_zh: 美国对德国药品定价政策展开关税调查
text: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said Germany's proposal to reduce spending on medicines was "a serious step backwards."
zh: 美国贸易代表杰米森·格里尔表示，德国减少药品支出的提议是“严重的倒退”。

title: UK gilt yields jump as borrowing rises and PM Starmer faces leadership challenge
title_zh: 随着借贷增加英国国债收益率飙升且首相斯塔默面临领导力挑战
text: Andy Burnham won the Makerfield by-election, defeating Reform UK by more than 9,000 votes with nearly 55% of the vote.
zh: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 赢得梅克菲尔德补选，以近 55% 的选票，以 9000 多票的优势击败改革英国 (Reform UK)。

title: What this biotech's volatile stock price tells you about the weight loss market right now
title_zh: 这家生物技术公司股价的波动告诉你关于目前减肥市场的信息
text: While the market's enthusiasm for one of Zealand's experimental drugs has cooled, investors are shifting focus to amylin-based medicines as a growth driver
zh: 虽然市场对新西兰一种实验药物的热情已经降温，但投资者正在将注意力转向以胰淀素为基础的药物，将其作为增长动力

title: The average SpaceX buyer post-IPO is almost under water after two-day slide
title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股后的平均买家在经历了两天的下滑后几乎陷入困境
text: Shares of SpaceX fell as much as 7% Thursday to $178, leaving the stock trading roughly in line with its volume-weighted average price of just under $180.
zh: 周四，SpaceX 股价下跌 7%，至 178 美元，该股交易价格大致与其略低于 180 美元的成交量加权平均价格一致。

title: Vance says U.S. isn’t giving Iran ‘a cent’ as he defends Trump peace deal
title_zh: 万斯表示美国没有给伊朗“一分钱”，因为他捍卫特朗普和平协议
text: "The only way the Iranians get any of these resources ... is if they comply fully" with the terms of the deal, Vice President JD Vance said.
zh: 副总统 JD 万斯表示，“伊朗获得这些资源的唯一途径……是他们完全遵守”协议条款。

title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
title_zh: 市场预计沃什美联储将比预期更加鹰派
text: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's tough talk on inflation Wednesday reverberated through financial markets.
zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什周三关于通胀的强硬言论在金融市场引起反响。

title: Trump administration temporarily cuts student loan interest rates for borrowers on autopay
title_zh: 特朗普政府暂时降低自动转账借款人的学生贷款利率
text: The Trump administration announced it will offer federal student loan borrowers who sign up for autopay a larger interest rate discount.
zh: 特朗普政府宣布将为签署自动转账的联邦学生贷款借款人提供更大的利率折扣。

title: Amazon investigating engineers who criticized AI data center expansion
title_zh: 亚马逊正在调查批评人工智能数据中心扩张的工程师
text: Five Amazon employees testified at Seattle City Council meetings where officials sought feedback on a year-long data center new construction pause.
zh: 五名亚马逊员工在西雅图市议会会议上作证，官员们在会议上寻求对长达一年的数据中心新建暂停的反馈。

title: U.S. Navy ends blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas
title_zh: 美国海军结束对伊朗港口和沿海地区的封锁
text: The Navy on Thursday lifted its blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas at the direction of President Donald Trump.
zh: 周四，美国海军按照唐纳德·特朗普总统的指示解除了对伊朗港口和沿海地区的封锁。

title: Waymo recalls about 3,900 robotaxis after some drove into 'freeway construction zones'
title_zh: Waymo 召回约 3,900 辆机器人出租车，原因是部分机器人出租车驶入“高速公路施工区”
text: After some Waymo robotaxis drove into closed construction zones, the company implemented a recall to fix underlying software issues.
zh: 在一些 Waymo 机器人出租车驶入封闭的建筑区域后，该公司实施了召回以修复潜在的软件问题。

title: In photos: Star-studded crowd gathers to celebrate the Obama Presidential Center dedication
title_zh: 照片中：众星云集，庆祝奥巴马总统中心落成
text: Barack Obama opened his presidential center in Chicago with former presidents, celebrities and dignitaries in attendance. President Donald Trump was absent.
zh: 巴拉克·奥巴马 (Barack Obama) 在芝加哥开设了他的总统中心，前总统、名人和政要出席了仪式。唐纳德·特朗普总统缺席。

title: Trump DNI pick Pulte poised to get access to U.S. intelligence despite congressional bid to thwart
title_zh: 特朗普国家情报总监任命普尔特准备接触美国情报，尽管国会试图阻止
text: With President Donald Trump halting his nomination of U.S. Attorney Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence, Bill Pulte is set to take on the role.
zh: 随着唐纳德·特朗普总统停止提名美国检察官杰伊·克莱顿担任国家情报总监，比尔·普尔特将接任这一职务。

title: Bears step up bets against high-yield sector, shaking up bond traders
title_zh: 空头加大对高收益板块的押注，震动债券交易员
text: The iShares iBoxx High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (HYG) saw elevated put volume on Thursday.
zh: iShares iBoxx 高收益企业债券 ETF (HYG) 周四看跌期权成交量有所增加。

title: Three Saudi oil tankers carrying 6 million barrels cross Strait of Hormuz
title_zh: 三艘沙特油轮载运600万桶穿越霍尔木兹海峡
text: The Saudi tankers switched their transponders on Thursday after hiding their location for more than two months.
zh: 沙特油轮在隐藏位置两个多月后于周四更换了应答器。

title: Kalshi traders see greater than 50% odds the Fed will hike rates this year
title_zh: 卡尔希交易员预计美联储今年加息的可能性超过 50%
text: The Federal Reserve suggested higher rates could be in the cards, and traders on Kalshi see growing odds of a hike in 2026.
zh: 美联储暗示可能会加息，卡尔希交易员认为 2026 年加息的可能性越来越大。

title: NBA to begin naming winning bids for Europe teams in the coming months, deputy commissioner says
title_zh: NBA副总裁表示，未来几个月将开始为欧洲球队确定中标球队
text: The NBA plans to begin naming winning bidders for 12 permanent European teams in the next 60 to 90 days, Deputy Commissioner Mark Tatum told CNBC.
zh: NBA 副总裁马克·塔图姆 (Mark Tatum) 告诉 CNBC，NBA 计划在未来 60 至 90 天内开始为 12 支常驻欧洲球队指定中标者。

title: Gas prices fall below $4 per gallon as oil supply fears ease after Iran deal
title_zh: 伊朗协议达成后，石油供应担忧缓解，天然气价格跌至每加仑 4 美元以下
text: Gas prices are still 30% higher compared with what drivers paid before the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran on Feb. 28.
zh: 与 2 月 28 日美国和以色列袭击伊朗之前司机支付的汽油价格相比，仍高出 30%。

title: OPEC chief dismisses IEA supply glut forecast as 'critical' Strait of Hormuz reopens
title_zh: 欧佩克主席驳斥了国际能源署供应过剩的预测，因为“关键”霍尔木兹海峡重新开放
text: The IEA said on Wednesday that a lasting resolution to the conflict could drive a surge in supply volumes and trigger a major oil overhang next year.
zh: 国际能源署周三表示，持久解决冲突可能会推动供应量激增，并引发明年的重大石油供应过剩。

title: Trump hits back at critics as Iran peace deal fuels debate over U.S. concessions
title_zh: 伊朗和平协议引发有关美国让步的争论，特朗普回击批评者
text: The deal sees both sides commit to further talks to reach a final agreement over the next 60 days and includes a $300 billion plan for Iran's reconstruction.
zh: 根据协议，双方承诺在未来 60 天内进行进一步谈判以达成最终协议，其中包括一项价值 3000 亿美元的伊朗重建计划。

title: Trump bid to fire Fed's Lisa Cook cost her more than $1M in legal, security costs: Filing
title_zh: 特朗普解雇美联储主席丽莎·库克的努力使她付出了超过 100 万美元的法律和安全费用：文件
text: A financial disclosure from Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook details large legal and security expenses
zh: 美联储理事丽莎库克的财务披露详细说明了巨额法律和安全费用

title: Here are 5 wild stats from SpaceX's first week on the Nasdaq
title_zh: 以下是 SpaceX 在纳斯达克上市第一周的 5 个疯狂统计数据
text: SpaceX's first few days of trading have been filled with superlatives, from trading volume to the size of the company's first acquisition.
zh: SpaceX 的头几天交易充满了最高级的内容，从交易量到公司首次收购的规模。

title: Intel gains 7% after Trump says company will partner with Apple on U.S. chip design
title_zh: 特朗普表示公司将与苹果就美国芯片设计进行合作，英特尔股价上涨 7%
text: The boost continues Intel's recent rally as the chipmaker bounces back from years of headwinds.
zh: 随着芯片制造商从多年的逆风中恢复过来，这一提振延续了近期的涨势。

title: Here are the odds of SpaceX becoming the world's most valuable company
title_zh: 以下是 SpaceX 成为全球最有价值公司的可能性
text: SpaceX debuted as the fifth-biggest stock. The path to third place could take years, at least according to options prices.
zh: SpaceX 首次亮相就成为第五大股票。至少从期权价格来看，通往第三位的道路可能需要数年时间。

title: Godfather of AI blasts Musk's xAI as 'failure,' says labs are risking a 'big bubble explosion'
title_zh: 人工智能教父抨击马斯克的 xAI 是“失败”，称实验室正面临“大泡沫爆炸”的风险
text: Yann LeCun's comments renew a long-running spat with Musk and cast doubt over valuations of some of the world's biggest AI companies.
zh: Yann LeCun 的言论再次引发了与马斯克之间的长期争执，并对一些全球最大的人工智能公司的估值产生了质疑。

title: California’s counting on an IPO tax windfall. Several factors are complicating the equation
title_zh: 加州指望着首次公开募股税收的意外收获。有几个因素使方程式变得复杂
text: The IPOs of SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic could create a tax windfall for the state of California. But experts say the revenue impact may be blunted.
zh: SpaceX、OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的 IPO 可能会为加利福尼亚州带来一笔意外的税收。但专家表示，收入影响可能会减弱。

title: Roy Cooper's North Carolina Senate race could help decide control of the next Congress
title_zh: 罗伊·库珀的北卡罗来纳州参议员竞选可能有助于决定下一届国会的控制权
text: North Carolina’s 2026 Senate race pits Democrat Roy Cooper against Republican Michael Whatley in a swing state Democrats haven't won since with Obama in 2008.
zh: 北卡罗来纳州 2026 年参议员竞选将由民主党人罗伊·库珀 (Roy Cooper) 与共和党人迈克尔·沃特利 (Michael Whatley) 对阵，这是一个摇摆州，自 2008 年奥巴马当选以来，民主党从未赢得过胜利。
